site_description: Your one-stop portal for all things Cabanatuan City Government. Access services, news, and information in one place.

hero.title: Welcome to BetterGov.ph
hero.subtitle: Find services, barangays, and elected officials in one place — organized for residents, businesses, and visitors.

meetOfficials.title: Meet Officials
meetOfficials.description: Mayor, vice mayor, and city council

getInTouch.title: Get in Touch
getInTouch.description: City hall, email, and portal support

services.title: Services & Information
services.description: Access official government services quickly and easily. Find what you need for citizenship, business, education, and more.

governmentActivity.title: Government Activity
governmentActivity.description: Stay updated with the latest government activities and announcements.

footer.copyright: © 2026 BetterGov. All content is public domain unless otherwise specified.

search.title: Search the Portal
search.inputLabel: Search services, barangays, and government pages
search.placeholder: Try health services, business permits, or a barangay name…
search.suggestionsDescription: Start with a common topic, or enter your own keywords above.
search.noResultsDescription: We couldn't find anything for "{{query}}". Try different keywords or browse a suggested topic below.
search.seoWithQuery: Search results for "{{query}}" on the {{city}} community portal.

joinUs.stripSubtitle: Help build the future of the Philippines and governance through technology
joinUs.bannerSubtitle: Help build the future of the Philippines and governance through technology.

cityStats.title: Key Facts About Our City
cityStats.subtitle: Quick statistics and essential information about {{city}}

section.title: Emergency Hotlines
section.description: For crimes, fires, rescue operations, and urgent community matters. Tap a number to call directly from your phone.
section.disclaimer: For non-emergency city services and permits, contact the <1>city government offices</1> during regular business hours. In life-threatening situations, call the nearest hotline above immediately.

departmentContacts.title: Department Contact Numbers
departmentContacts.description: Direct mobile lines for city offices — for permits, records, social services, and other non-emergency inquiries during business hours.

contact.seoDescription: Contact {{city}} — phone, email, city hall address, and community portal support.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Reach the {{city}} government or the volunteer team behind this community portal. We're here to help you find the right office and information.

cityGovernment.title: City Government
cityGovernment.description: For official transactions, permits, and city services.

communityPortal.title: Community Portal
communityPortal.description: Report outdated information, suggest improvements, or volunteer with Better Cabanatuan.

officeHours.title: Office Hours & Response
officeHours.cityHours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Philippine Standard Time). Closed on national and local holidays.
officeHours.portalResponse: Community volunteers respond to portal-related messages within 2–3 business days. For urgent official matters, contact the city government directly.

findOffice.title: Find the Right Office
findOffice.description: Browse government sections to find the department or information you need.

contact.disclaimer: This contact page is part of the Better Cabanatuan community portal, not an official government system. For verified transactions and official records, always use the <1>official {{city}} website</1> or visit City Hall in person.

about.seoDescription: About the {{city}} community portal — {{barangays}} barangays, {{services}} service areas, and local government information.

hero.title: About {{city}}
hero.subtitle: An independent, volunteer-led portal helping residents navigate {{serviceCount}} service areas, {{govCount}} government sections, and {{barangayCount}} barangays across {{province}}.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body1: This portal is an independent, volunteer-led project built to help residents of {{city}} find accurate information about government services, departments, and public programs — quickly and in plain language.
mission.body2: We believe that better access to information leads to more engaged citizens, stronger communities, and more accountable governance.

history.title: History of Cabanatuan City
history.description: From its founding as a pueblo in 1777 to its charter as a city in 1950 — the story of Cabanatuan City in Nueva Ecija.

leadership.title: City Leadership
leadership.description: Elected officials serving {{city}} for the current term.

services.title: Services & Information
services.description: Browse service categories curated from our local government catalog.

government.title: Government Activity
government.description: Explore departments, barangays, transparency documents, and more.

openInformation.title: Open Information
openInformation.description: Public data and services, organized clearly.

communityDriven.title: Community Driven
communityDriven.description: Built by volunteers, maintained for residents.

disclaimer.title: Independent Project Disclaimer
disclaimer.body1: This portal is a community-run project and is not an official government website. Information is gathered from public sources and official channels to the best of our knowledge.
disclaimer.body2: For official transactions, verification, and the most current requirements, please contact the city government directly at <1>{{email}}</1> or visit the <2>official {{city}} website</2>.

contribute.title: Help Us Improve
contribute.body: Found outdated information? Have a suggestion? This project is open source and welcomes contributions from the community.
